MW Stands Cyntaf Equipment Support System Debut At Audio Show Deluxe 2026

February 27, 2026

MW STANDS CYNTAF EQUIPMENT SUPPORT SYSTEM UK DEBUT

MW Stands will make its official UK debut at Audio Show Deluxe 2026, introducing the MW Stands Cyntaf Equipment Support System to a British audience for the first time.

The Welsh manufacturer will present its equipment support solution as part of its first public appearance at the show.

MW STANDS CYNTAF EQUIPMENT SUPPORT SYSTEM

The MW Stands Cyntaf Equipment Support System is designed and hand-built in Wales. It uses close-grained super prime hardwoods, Welsh slate, birch ply and brass fixings in its construction. The design incorporates a constrained-layer damping structure intended to support mechanical stability and control vibration for HiFi components.

ENGINEERING APPROACH

Combining traditional materials with precision engineering techniques, the MW Stands Cyntaf Equipment Support System is positioned as a support platform for high-performance HiFi installations. The layered construction aims to manage resonance and provide a stable base for source and amplification equipment.

MW STANDS CYNTAF EQUIPMENT SUPPORT SYSTEM WITH HENLEY AUDIO

Audio Show Deluxe 2026 will mark the first public UK showing of the MW Stands Cyntaf Equipment Support System. MW Stands will exhibit three examples of the support system in collaboration with Henley Audio, integrating them into a wider demonstration system throughout the event.

MW Stands will be located in the Wellington B room at the Whittlebury Park Hotel with Henley Audio.

AUDIO SHOW DELUXE 2026 INFO & TICKETS

Audio Show Deluxe returns for its fourth year in 2026, bringing together the UK’s most prestigious audio brands under one roof. From celebrated international names to specialist artisans, this is an event dedicated to the very best in high-end audio. Music lovers will have the chance to discover systems that redefine what true luxury listening can be.

Audio Show Deluxe takes place on the 21st March and 22nd March 2026
Location: Whittlebury Park Hotel, Whittlebury, Towcester NN12 8QH

Opening Times: The show will open on Saturday from 9.30 am to 6.00 pm. A live performance by King Brasstards will take place at 5:00 pm.

On Sunday, the show will run from 9.30 am to 5.00 pm. The live music performance will begin at 4.00 pm, featuring guitarist Antonio Forcione.

Visitors attending across the weekend will be able to experience both the full exhibitor line-up and the scheduled live performances as part of the Audio Show Deluxe programme.

Tickets can be booked in advance here
